import csv
# Check questions resolving Jan 26 - Feb 1

blocks.content:
Patriots punch ticket to 12th Super Bowl with gritty 10-7 win over Broncos in snowy Denver
Drake Maye ran for 68 yards and threw for 86 in sloppy, snowy conditions and scored New England's only touchdown on a 6-yard keeper, propelling the Patriots to their 12th Super Bowl with a 10-7 win over the Denver Broncos on Sunday.
Christian Gonzalez intercepted Jarrett Stidham, starting in place of an injured Bo Nix, at New England's 36 with 2:11 remaining and the Patriots (17-3) iced their firs
---
New England Patriots headed to Super Bowl LX after withstanding Denver Broncos
It wasn't pretty, but the New England Patriots are headed to Super Bowl LX after beating the Denver Broncos, 10-7, in the AFC Championship Game.
The Patriots offense struggled against a top-rated Denver Broncos defense. But New England's own defense held backup Broncos quarterback Jarrett Stidham in check, and withstood miserable weather conditions to win.

python3 -c "
import json
# AO men's QF matchups: Alcaraz vs de Minaur, Djokovic, Zverev
# Need to check the full draw to predict who wins AO men's
with open('articles/2026/01/25/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = (a.get('title','') or '').lower()
        content = (a.get('content','') or '').lower()
        if 'australian open' in content and 'quarter' in content and 'final' in content:
            if any(k in title for k in ['alcaraz', 'sinner', 'djokovic', 'zverev']):
                print(a.get('title','')[:160])
                # Find QF matchup info
                for name in ['quarter-final', 'quarterfinal', 'last eight']:
                    idx = content.find(name)
                    if idx >= 0:
                        print(content[max(0,idx-50):idx+300])
                        break
                print('---')
" | head -30
